## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guide
- [ ] I ran `cargo fmt` / `pnpm lint` and there are no warnings
- [ ] I ran `cargo test` / `pnpm test` and all tests pass
- [ ] I updated relevant documentation
- [ ] My commit messages follow the [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) format
- [ ] I have not introduced new secrets or credentials in the codebase
- [ ] I have considered the security implications of my changes
